subcodes.first_line: O companion of those who have turned to God! The letter thou didst write to Jináb-i-Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh—its contents became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس مقبلان نامه ای که بجناب آقا سید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودی مضمونش معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
